response.justification: Despite a strong full-stack and open-source background, the candidate lacks demonstrable C++ experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems beyond a brief role at National Instruments over a decade ago; core requirements like STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, and industrial protocols are absent from their recent work, which is dominated by TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang in web/cloud contexts.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with modern web and cloud technologies
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication skills
Proven ability to lead, mentor, and deliver complex distributed systems
concerns: No recent C++ or STL work; critical for this role
Lacks exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or automation protocols
Primary tech stack (TypeScript/Node.js/DLang) misaligned with core C++ requirements
